title: Trials
subtitle: Manage 5-day trial periods for inside-country workers
name: Name
create_description: Start a 5-day trial period for an inside-country or returnee worker
worker_id_help: Worker must be inside the country and in Available or NewArrival status
empty_description: Create a trial to start a 5-day probation period.
proceed_message: Worker will proceed to a 2-year contract. You will be redirected to create the contract.
return_message: Worker will be returned to inventory with Available status. The associated placement (if any) will be cancelled.
cancel_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to cancel this trial? The worker will be returned to available status.
delete_description: Are you sure you want to delete this trial? This action cannot be undone.
